title: Revansiddha Temple
tagline: Revansiddha Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Renavi is a village in Sangli district, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Renavi is a village in Sangli district, Maharashtra, India. The village has one primary school and one high school. A local temple dedicated to the Hindu god Revansiddhanath was built in the 16th century. Revansiddha Temple is a temple to the Hindu god also known as Revansiddha.

topPlaces.name: Ghoti Khurd
topPlaces.description: Ghoti Khurd is a small village in the state of Maharashtra. Ghoti Khurd is located in the Sangli district, Khanapur taluka.

topPlaces.name: Atpadi
topPlaces.description: Atpadi is an administrative town of the Atpadi Taluka of Sangli District in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Atpadi is located north-east of Sangli District and shares borders with the adjacent Solapur and Satara Districts.

topPlaces.name: Vita, Maharashtra
topPlaces.description: Vita, also known as Vite, is a town and a municipal council in Sangli district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Vita is also taluka headquarters of Khanapur taluka.

topPlaces.name: Gardi, India
topPlaces.description: Gardi is a village situated in Sangli district, Khanapur (Vita) taluka, Pune division of Maharashtra, India. It falls under desh or Paschim Maharashtra region.

topPlaces.name: Khanapur (Vita)
topPlaces.description: Khanapur (Vita) is a village and taluka and a subdivision of Sangli district of Maharashtra in India.

items.note: Ghoti Khurd is a small village in the state of Maharashtra. Ghoti Khurd is located in the Sangli district, Khanapur taluka.

Atpadi is an administrative town of the Atpadi Taluka of Sangli District in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Atpadi is located north-east of Sangli District and shares borders with the adjacent Solapur and Satara Districts.
Vita, also known as Vite, is a town and a municipal council in Sangli district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Vita is also taluka headquarters of Khanapur taluka.
Gardi is a village situated in Sangli district, Khanapur (Vita) taluka, Pune division of Maharashtra, India. It falls under desh or Paschim Maharashtra region.
Khanapur (Vita) is a village and taluka and a subdivision of Sangli district of Maharashtra in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Revansiddha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Revansiddha Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Revansiddha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (145 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Revansiddha Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Revansiddha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Revansiddha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Revansiddha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Revansiddha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ghoti Khurd, Atpadi, Vita, Maharashtra, Gardi, India, Khanapur (Vita).
